creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Ran into this today while running comprehensive ports update on my -CURRENT laptop (currently r271197).

I don't think it's related to Berkeley DB.

I know I have had gcc-4.7.4.20131214 built previously without problems.

Still, with gcc47-4.7.4.20131214 I cannot currently build devel/kBuild (also due to some fixed-header problem related to __wchar_t).

Not sure if libstdc++ removal might have influenced things, or just gcc port updates?
